TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ayma a tademaw u timulay nu amilika antis atu altipulanu aitidaay a binacadan u tademaw nuheni malakuwit ku tusalasubu aemang ku aymala a tademaw nikaudip i puliwiya, milu, celi, itidanamin i niyadu maluk ku nikaudip. yu 15 a siki nu inciya atademaw nuayawan 16 a siki u sipanya ku sitatudungay itawya, itini i timulan nu amilika maudip pina tu a siki. paluma, pahabay tu katalan ucacanan atu mibuting usakaudip nu henisa nikaalaan. umikingkiway palutatenga tu ayma a tademaw nu kakawsan sa nanu enem a emang tu tusaaemang a mihcaan namakayni i yacu mabulaw tayni, sayaway napapikanay tu sidi' ku nikaudip, yu pulug nu mihcaan sepat amalebut a mihcaan u kakawsa mipaayaw tu paluma tu cacanan, duma a tademaw malingatu i keke hananay tepal nu sauwac kuluma. pulung numihcaan enem a lasubu sa, idaw ku tusaay a emang i alputilanu a buyu'an mueneng. Tiyawanake nanu tawya a patideng. nika, pulung nu mihcaan cacay amalebut katukuh cacaymalebut idaw ku cacay a lasubu a mihcaan, ina niyadu masubelit sipibakah, sakamu sa ku mikiung kikiway namakedal itinasa . 15 a sikinuteban, aymala atademaw atu liwliw nu niyadu' mapatungus nu inciya a tademaw . Aymala a tademaw pacicihan tu pasayda i inciya a padamsu, tu sipanya atademaw misawacu micumud, kiyu inciya a kanatal maala. U sipanya hat uku mikuwanay idaw t uku baluhay a hulic, sakatuud sa kunipalaklak tu mi sindingay tu tinsukiw. baluhay a tayniay u maedesay sakay binawlan misabana' tu aymala a tademaw , mialaw tu umah' nu intian, mialaw aca tu kel a kitidaan kakutkutan tu baba'tuwan, u aymala a tademaw sabana han papikutkut tu baba'tuwan, capapihanhan cayay panademiadan . i 1781 a mihcaan, aymala a sinin ci tupuka.katali.lapas mukelid tu intian atademaw palekal midademec , pecien naming nu heni ku kiwkay atu kitidaan nu siyhu, katukuh i 19 a siki, ubalucu' nu binawlan midademec tu maedesay madangkic ku heni amubelin tu mahidaay a siyhu, u celi 1818 a mihcaan uheni patideng tu kanatal, u puluwiya,milu a kanatal makakilul naming patideng tu kanatal nu heni, makakilunamin atu puliwal mukelid malpacaw kiyu misiteked. hidasa, aymala atademaw mapahengad nu salengacay a tademaw u kawaw nuheni caay kasumad. Katukuh 20 a siki nuteban paculuay sidubu tu amilpacaw hinapaculi tu, sawsawni masasuada tu, 20 a siki nudikuda tu, aymala a tademaw i tini usapikuwan tu sakaudip nu binawlan maniket tu kuheni, uduma ci ukekatenase namala sakatusaay a puluwiya a hucungtung.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ajma a tad…ômaw u timur~…ĺaj nu amir~…ĺika antis atu ar~…ĺtipur~…ĺanu aitidaaj a bina ¶adan u tad…ômaw nuńß…ôni mar~…ĺakuwit ku tusar~…ĺasubu a…ômaŇč ku ajmar~…ĺa a tad…ômaw nikaudip i pur~…ĺiwija, mir~…ĺu, ¶…ôr~…ĺi, itidanamin i nijadu mar~…ĺuk ku nikaudip. ju ** a siki nu in ¶ija atad…ômaw nuajawan ** a siki u sipanja ku sitatuduŇčaj itawja, itini i timur~…ĺan nu amir~…ĺika maudip pina tu a siki. par~…ĺuma, pańßabaj tu katar~…ĺan u ¶a ¶anan atu mibutiŇč usakaudip nu ńß…ônisa nikaar~…ĺaan. umikiŇčkiwaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇča tu ajma a tad…ômaw nu kakawsan sa nanu …ôn…ôm a …ômaŇč tu tusaa…ômaŇč a mińß ¶aan namakajni i ja ¶u mabur~…ĺaw tajni, sajawaj napapikanaj tu sidi Ē~ ° ku nikaudip, ju pur~…ĺug nu mińß ¶aan s…ôpat amar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan u kakawsa mipaajaw tu par~…ĺuma tu ¶a ¶anan, duma a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu i k…ôk…ô ńßananaj t…ôpar~…ĺ nu sauwa ¶ kur~…ĺuma. pur~…ĺuŇč numińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubu sa, idaw ku tusaaj a …ômaŇč i ar~…ĺputir~…ĺanu a buju Ē~ °an mu…ôn…ôŇč. tijawanak…ô nanu tawja a patid…ôŇč. nika, pur~…ĺuŇč nu mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj amar~…ĺ…ôbut katukuńß ¶a ¶ajmar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan, ina nijadu masub…ôr~…ĺit sipibakańß, sakamu sa ku mikiuŇč kikiwaj namak…ôdar~…ĺ itinasa . ** a sikinut…ôban, ajmar~…ĺa atad…ômaw atu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu nijadu Ē~ ° mapatuŇčus nu in ¶ija a tad…ômaw . ajmar~…ĺa a tad…ômaw pa ¶i ¶ińßan tu pasajda i in ¶ija a padamsu, tu sipanja atad…ômaw misawa ¶u mi ¶umud, kiju in ¶ija a kanatar~…ĺ maar~…ĺa. u sipanja ńßat uku mikuwanaj idaw t uku bar~…ĺuńßaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, sakatuud sa kunipar~…ĺakr~…ĺak tu mi sindiŇčaj tu tinsukiw. bar~…ĺuńßaj a tajniaj u ma…ôd…ôsaj sakaj binawr~…ĺan misabana Ē~ ° tu ajmar~…ĺa a tad…ômaw , miar~…ĺaw tu umańß Ē~ ° nu intian, miar~…ĺaw a ¶a tu k…ôr~…ĺ a kitidaan kakutkutan tu baba Ē~ °tuwan, u ajmar~…ĺa a tad…ômaw sabana ńßan papikutkut tu baba Ē~ °tuwan, ¶apapińßanńßan ¶ajaj panad…ômiadan . i **** a mińß ¶aan, ajmar~…ĺa a sinin ¶i tupuka.katar~…ĺi.r~…ĺapas muk…ôr~…ĺid tu intian atad…ômaw par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ midad…ôm…ô ¶ , p…ô ¶i…ôn namiŇč nu ńß…ôni ku kiwkaj atu kitidaan nu sijńßu, katukuńß i ** a siki, ubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu binawr~…ĺan midad…ôm…ô ¶ tu ma…ôd…ôsaj madaŇčki ¶ ku ńß…ôni amub…ôr~…ĺin tu mańßidaaj a sijńßu, u ¶…ôr~…ĺi **** a mińß ¶aan uńß…ôni patid…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺ, u pur~…ĺuwija,mir~…ĺu a kanatar~…ĺ makakir~…ĺur~…ĺ namiŇč patid…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺ nu ńß…ôni, makakir~…ĺunamin atu pur~…ĺiwar~…ĺ muk…ôr~…ĺid mar~…ĺpa ¶aw kiju misit…ôk…ôd. ńßidasa, ajmar~…ĺa atad…ômaw mapańß…ôŇčad nu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tad…ômaw u kawaw nuńß…ôni ¶aaj kasumad. katukuńß ** a siki nut…ôban pa ¶ur~…ĺuaj sidubu tu amir~…ĺpa ¶aw ńßinapa ¶ur~…ĺi tu, sawsawni masasuada tu, ** a siki nudikuda tu, ajmar~…ĺa a tad…ômaw i tini usapikuwan tu sakaudip nu binawr~…ĺan manik…ôt tu kuńß…ôni, uduma ¶i uk…ôkat…ônas…ô namar~…ĺa sakatusaaj a pur~…ĺuwija a ńßu ¶uŇčtuŇč.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ayma a tademaw u timulay nu amilika antis atu altipulanu aitidaay a binacadan u tademaw nuheni malakuwit ku tusalasubu aemang ku aymala a tademaw nikaudip i puliwiya, milu, celi, itidanamin i niyadu maluk ku nikaudip. yu 15 a siki nu inciya atademaw nuayawan 16 a siki u sipanya ku sitatudungay itawya, itini i timulan nu amilika maudip pina tu a siki. paluma, pahabay tu katalan ucacanan atu mibuting usakaudip nu henisa nikaalaan. umikingkiway palutatenga tu ayma a tademaw nu kakawsan sa nanu enem a emang tu tusaaemang a mihcaan namakayni i yacu mabulaw tayni, sayaway napapikanay tu sidi' ku nikaudip, yu pulug nu mihcaan sepat amalebut a mihcaan u kakawsa mipaayaw tu paluma tu cacanan, duma a tademaw malingatu i keke hananay tepal nu sauwac kuluma. pulung numihcaan enem a lasubu sa, idaw ku tusaay a emang i alputilanu a buyu'an mueneng. Tiyawanake nanu tawya a patideng. nika, pulung nu mihcaan cacay amalebut katukuh cacaymalebut idaw ku cacay a lasubu a mihcaan, ina niyadu masubelit sipibakah, sakamu sa ku mikiung kikiway namakedal itinasa . 15 a sikinuteban, aymala atademaw atu liwliw nu niyadu' mapatungus nu inciya a tademaw . Aymala a tademaw pacicihan tu pasayda i inciya a padamsu, tu sipanya atademaw misawacu micumud, kiyu inciya a kanatal maala. U sipanya hat uku mikuwanay idaw t uku baluhay a hulic, sakatuud sa kunipalaklak tu mi sindingay tu tinsukiw. baluhay a tayniay u maedesay sakay binawlan misabana' tu aymala a tademaw , mialaw tu umah' nu intian, mialaw aca tu kel a kitidaan kakutkutan tu baba'tuwan, u aymala a tademaw sabana han papikutkut tu baba'tuwan, capapihanhan cayay panademiadan . i 1781 a mihcaan, aymala a sinin ci tupuka.katali.lapas mukelid tu intian atademaw palekal midademec , pecien naming nu heni ku kiwkay atu kitidaan nu siyhu, katukuh i 19 a siki, ubalucu' nu binawlan midademec tu maedesay madangkic ku heni amubelin tu mahidaay a siyhu, u celi 1818 a mihcaan uheni patideng tu kanatal, u puluwiya,milu a kanatal makakilul naming patideng tu kanatal nu heni, makakilunamin atu puliwal mukelid malpacaw kiyu misiteked. hidasa, aymala atademaw mapahengad nu salengacay a tademaw u kawaw nuheni caay kasumad. Katukuh 20 a siki nuteban paculuay sidubu tu amilpacaw hinapaculi tu, sawsawni masasuada tu, 20 a siki nudikuda tu, aymala a tademaw i tini usapikuwan tu sakaudip nu binawlan maniket tu kuheni, uduma ci ukekatenase namala sakatusaay a puluwiya a hucungtung.

k…ôr~…ĺ a kitidaan kakutkutan tu baba Ē~ °tuwan, u ajmar~…ĺa a tad…ômaw sabana ńßan papikutkut tu baba Ē~ °tuwan, ¶apapińßanńßan ¶ajaj panad…ômiadan . i **** a mińß ¶aan, ajmar~…ĺa a sinin ¶i tupuka.katar~…ĺi.r~…ĺapas muk…ôr~…ĺid tu intian atad…ômaw par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ midad…ôm…ô ¶ , p…ô ¶i…ôn namiŇč nu ńß…ôni ku kiwkaj atu kitidaan nu sijńßu, katukuńß i ** a siki, ubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu makakir~…ĺur~…ĺ namiŇč patid…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺ nu ńß…ôni, makakir~…ĺunamin atu pur~…ĺiwar~…ĺ muk…ôr~…ĺid mar~…ĺpa ¶aw kiju misit…ôk…ôd. ńßidasa, ajmar~…ĺa atad…ômaw mapańß…ôŇčad nu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tad…ômaw u kawaw nuńß…ôni ¶aaj kasumad. katukuńß ** a siki nut…ôban pa ¶ur~…ĺuaj sidubu tu amir~…ĺpa ¶aw ńßinapa ¶ur~…ĺi tu, sawsawni masasuada tu, ** a siki nudikuda tu, ajmar~…ĺa a tad…ômaw i tini usapikuwan tu sakaudip nu binawr~…ĺan manik…ôt tu kuńß…ôni, uduma ¶i uk…ôkat…ônas…ô namar~…ĺa sakatusaaj a pur~…ĺuwija a ńßu ¶uŇčtuŇč.
